title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CITRUS, CITY OF SAN JOSE DEL MONTE, PROVINCE OF BULACAN TO BE KNOWN AS CITRUS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
109 OG No. 4, 396 (January 28, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10256, November 15, 2012 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CITRUS, CITY OF SAN JOSE DEL MONTE, PROVINCE OF BULACAN TO BE KNOWN AS CITRUS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Establishment of a National High School.

â

There shall be established, under the supervision of the Department of

Education, a national high school in Barangay Citrus, City of San Jose

del Monte, Province of Bulacan to be known as Citrus National High

School.

SEC. 2.

Appropriations.

â The Secretary of Education

shall immediately include in the Departmentâs program the

operationalization of the Citrus National High School, the funding of

which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3.

Implementation. â

The Secretary of Education shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 4.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was

finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 6,

2011 and July 24, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

NOV 15 2012

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
